title: SpecGraph ADR-002: Gastown Integration
summary: Describes how SpecGraph specs become Beads consumed by Gastown's multi-agent execution system (Mayor, Polecats, Refinery).
notes: Filename and manifest indicate ADR, but no explicit Status field (Accepted/Proposed) or dedicated Decision/Consequences sections were found in the scanned content; classified as ADR per manifest but not marked locked absent an Accepted status marker.
